---
title: "Filter.Interface"
description: "Settings for including an interface in CumulativeFilter. There are four possible values: HIDE_VIEW_HIDE_CREATED_EVENT_BLOB and INCLUDE_VIEW_HIDE_CREATED_EVENT_BLOB and HIDE_VIEW_INCLUDE_CREATED_EVENT_BLOB and INCLUDE_VIEW_INCLUDE_CREATED_EVENT_BLOB."
---
